description: The Opportunity A new opportunity is available to acquire a well-established, local CPA firm in the Greater Knoxville Area. Operating as a home-based business, this turn-key practice is ready to be seamlessly integrated into an existing office or relocated to a new local space. The practice boasts a desirable, year-round revenue stream with consistent monthly cash flow, driven by accounting, bookkeeping, and payroll services. The sellers are seeking a qualified buyer with significant public accounting and tax preparation experience who can maintain the high standard of service and trusted rela

The Opportunity Seize the opportunity to acquire a well-established, fully paperless CPA practice with a good reputation. The retiring seller is seeking a qualified CPA buyer and is fully committed to providing structured transition assistance to ensure seamless client retention. This practice is attractive due to its deep-rooted community presence, paperless office systems, and a large number of loyal business clients.

The Opportunity Seize the opportunity to acquire a thriving, well-balanced CPA practice in South St. Louis County. Boasting a strong fee structure and excellent cash flow to the owner, this firm is perfectly positioned for a seamless handover. The practice features a highly experienced staff and a loyal client base that provides steady, year-round revenue. The current owner is approaching retirement but is fully committed to staying on for a customized transition period to another CPA to ensure client retention and operational continuity. Best of all, the practice can remain in its current, we

The Opportunity Looking for a modern, thriving practice with built-in scalability? This rapidly growing Enrolled Agent (EA) firm in Fayetteville offers the perfect blend of skyrocketing revenue and operational stability for a CPA or EA buyer. To keep pace with its accelerated growth, the forward-thinking seller has proactively hired a talented, capable team—meaning the firm is fully staffed for the 2027 tax season and ready for a seamless hand-off. The seller is looking to pursue other business interests but is fully committed to assisting with a smooth, comprehensive transition to ensure clie

The Opportunity This well-established Little Rock CPA firm is on the market as the current owners prepare for retirement. Boasting a healthy fee structure and a diverse base of business clients, the practice generates excellent cash flow. Currently managed by two owners working a combined 1.25 FTE, the firm offers significant efficiency and work-life balance. The practice is primed for a smooth handover, with the sellers committed to assisting in the transition. The office can remain in its current location or be easily integrated into another local firm.

The Opportunity An exceptional opportunity is available to acquire a nice CPA firm in the Northwest Little Rock metro area. The retiring seller has built a deeply loyal clientele backed by a talented, established staff. This practice is ideal for an individual CPA seeking entrepreneurship or an established firm looking for a strategic regional expansion.

The Opportunity This is a premier opportunity to acquire a well-established CPA firm in the Tulsa area. Known for its strong local legacy and modernized operations, this practice offers a turnkey solution for a buyer seeking a firm with high-quality realization and an efficient workflow. With its strong fee structure and loyal clientele, this firm is perfectly positioned for a CPA buyer looking to expand their footprint in Oklahoma or for an individual practitioner ready to step into a high-performing legacy practice.

The Opportunity An established and reputable Tulsa CPA firm is on the market as the owner prepares for retirement. This practice boasts a loyal, long-standing client base and an experienced staff, ensuring a smooth transition for a CPA buyer. Featuring a strong fee structure and nice cash flow to the owner, the firm operates out of a great location with the option to remain in the current space. This is an ideal, turnkey opportunity for an individual CPA or an existing firm looking to expand their footprint in the Tulsa market.

The seller of this El Paso CPA firm is approaching retirement and seeking a CPA buyer for the firm. Boasting a loyal clientele, a large number of business clients, an experienced staff, and a nice cash flow to the owner, this firm is a great opportunity for a CPA (or two!) to own their own firm or for an existing firm to seek another location. The seller is willing to assist with a smooth transition and the firm can remain in its current location.

The Opportunity This is a prime opportunity to acquire a thriving CPA firm in Syracuse, New York. The current owner is transitioning toward retirement and is looking for a qualified successor with a strong background in public accounting and tax preparation to carry on the firm’s legacy.

This boutique firm is a fully virtual, full service firm providing CAS and tax preparation services to cannabis clients nationwide. With strong systems and standards in place, the firm is stable and ready to be transferred to a new owner. Most clients have been converted to flat-rate billing, providing consistent revenues. The seller only works part-time in the firm and is seeking a buyer to focus on other business interests. The seller and current staff are willing to assist with a smooth transition to a new team.

The Opportunity The owners of this reputable Southeast Missouri practice with two established locations are seeking a qualified CPA to carry on their legacy as they prepare for retirement. This is a turnkey opportunity featuring a diverse client base, a solid local reputation, and nice owner cash flow.

The Opportunity This Durham-based EA firm offers a nice opportunity for a CPA, EA, or experienced tax professional to acquire a practice with deep community roots and a turnkey operational structure. Located in a thriving, high-growth corridor, the firm is supported by a loyal, long-term client base and an established team in place, ensuring stability from day one. The current owners are committed to a seamless transition, and the office location is available for continued lease, providing immediate continuity for both staff and clients.

The Opportunity This well-established CPA firm in the Springfield area is an ideal acquisition for a CPA or EA looking for a turnkey operation with a modern edge. Whether you are looking to expand your existing footprint in Missouri or step into your first practice with a built-in support system, this firm is positioned for immediate success. The firm boasts a solid fee structure and a reputation for efficiency and the sellers are prepared to assist the buyer during the transition period. The current owners are transitioning to new interests but are committed to ensuring a seamless handoff to

The sellers of this NWA CPA firm are approaching retirement but are willing to assist with a smooth transition of the firm after a sale and are seeking a CPA or EA buyer. There are so many reasons to like this firm, including a great fee structure, a nice cash flow to the owners and most of the clients’ information is handled through the portal or through a drop off/pick up system. The building is available for lease.

The Opportunity This Austin CPA firm is a high-quality, well-established firm located in a prime area, serving a diverse portfolio that includes the construction, restaurant, and service industries. Unlike many traditional firms, this practice features a client base primarily aged 50 and younger, offering long-term retention and growth potential.

The motivated seller of this CPA firm in south Ft Worth is approaching retirement and is seeking a buyer for the firm. The practice boasts a loyal clientele, about half of which speak both Spanish and English. The firm is well-staffed with experienced employees, and most are bilingual as well. The practice can remain in its current location following a sale and owner is willing to assist with a smooth transition. Some seller financing could be available for a qualified buyer.

This fully virtual CAAS firm serves marketing, e-commerce, real estate, and professional services clients nationwide, with projected revenue of approximately $1.45M in 2025. The firm operates on a value-billing model with ACH payments, twice-yearly automatic fee increases, and business tax packages averaging approximately $6,800, producing consistent and predictable cash flow.

This is a controller as a service consulting firm for start ups. They perform bookkeeping, tax, and human resources to fully support clients back-office needs. They are committed to helping organizations grow quickly and stay lean. They have fully remote capabilities with clients and employees in multiple states.

The Opportunity A nice opportunity has become available in the Albuquerque market. This established CPA firm strikes the perfect balance between stable, immediate profitability and a genuinely enviable workflow. Whether you are a CPA, EA, or other experienced preparer looking for a reliable “quality of life” practice or a solid foundation to scale, this firm is structured to deliver.

The Opportunity This CPA firm located in the central part of northern Arkansas has built an excellent reputation by delivering high-quality professional services to a loyal client base. The practice boasts a nice fee structure and consistently delivers stable cash flow to the owner, making it an exceptional opportunity for an individual CPA or an existing firm looking to expand.

The Opportunity This well-regarded practice operates as a second office for a prominent CPA firm. The owners are planning for retirement and are looking for a qualified CPA or EA to take the reins. With a loyal client base and a seasoned team already in place, this is an ideal “turnkey” opportunity for a first-time owner or an existing firm looking to expand its footprint. The office space is available for continued lease, ensuring a seamless transition for both staff and clients.

The Opportunity Seize the opportunity to acquire a highly reputable CPA firm with deep roots in the Ark-La-Tex region. The current owners are preparing for retirement and are seeking a qualified CPA to carry on the firm’s legacy of excellence. This practice is characterized by its robust fee structure, nice cash flow, and a loyal client base that has been cultivated over years of service.

This four-partner CPA firm is a boutique tax practice specializing in accounting and tax services for mid to high-net-worth families and their entities. The firm’s services include equity compensation tax services for tech and biotech founders, S-Corp formation, and foreign income reporting. The firm’s owners have meticulously designed every aspect of the business to ensure top-quality work, high productivity, and exceptional customer service. The service mix is 57% personal tax returns, 29% business tax, and the rest of the book consists of consulting and accounting services. 2023 gross incom

This is a rare opportunity to acquire 70–100% equity in a firm with institutional-level systems and untapped growth potential. The owner is seeking a larger platform or strategic partner to continue scaling. This practice is ideal for a family office, PE group, or multi-office CPA firm aiming to grow through advisory expansion and acquisitions.

This is a rare combination of legacy stability, rising growth, and solid operational structure—offered with built-in transition support and an outstanding, cohesive team. The firm’s revenue mix is heavily tax-focused, with 49% from personal returns (half tied to business owners), and 33% from business tax—with premium pricing averaging $2,343 per return.

This 4-partner firm has always put their clients’ needs and future first which is reflected in their reputation within the community. Three out of four owners want to stay on as employees for the right buyer. The partner retiring owns the majority stake.

Opportunity Expand your firm’s footprint with a highly streamlined, 100% remote client list ready for immediate absorption. Built by owners preparing for retirement, this profitable portfolio is ideal for an established CPA firm looking to scale their recurring revenue. Due to the requirements of attest work, the buyer must be a licensed CPA. Some onsite fieldwork will be required.

The Opportunity High-demand opportunity to acquire a well-established, single-owner CPA practice in Cobb County in the Atlanta metro area. Founded and built from the ground up, this firm is characterized by its resilience, premium client loyalty, and a trajectory of consistent year-over-year revenue growth. This is an ideal acquisition for an individual CPA or EA practitioner looking to step into a turnkey operation or an existing CPA or EA firm seeking to expand its footprint in the lucrative North Atlanta market.

Established for over two decades, this fully virtual bookkeeping and accounting firm has built a loyal client base entirely through referrals from auditors, tax accountants, and satisfied clients. The firm operates within a well-defined specialty niche and pairs a CPA with a bookkeeper on every engagement, delivering a high-touch, relationship-driven service model.

For over 30 years, this established CPA firm has been a cornerstone for providing top-tier accounting, business consulting and tax solutions. The business is made up of 30% bookkeeping, 50% business and personal tax and 20% business consulting and other. This firm is fully staffed with an impressive, dedicated, and skilled staff. With over 20 employees, several who work remotely, this firm runs very efficiently allowing the owner to focus on management responsibilities. This is a unique chance to purchase a premier hybrid cloud CPA company with 5 locations across the US. This firm, which provides services including bookkeeping, payroll, sales tax, tax planning, and preparation, runs smoothly with a dependable, diligent, and remote-ready staff. This company is incredibly lean, focused on low operating costs while upholding excellent service standards thanks to a well-developed infrastructure and simplified processes. A lot of the work is divided among employees from all locations, enhancing efficiency.

The Opportunity Step into a thriving, highly reputable accounting practice strategically positioned in Lake County, IN, in a Chicago suburb near the IN/IL border. Boasting an enviable fee structure and excellent cash flow to the sole owner, this firm features a large loyal base of business clients that offers consistent, year-round revenue. The seller is committed to a smooth transition and is seeking a qualified CPA buyer but is open to an experienced EA and selling the attest work separately.

This is a well-established and highly profitable CPA practice located in Indiana, generating nearly $2.9M in annual revenue. The firm enjoys longstanding relationships with a loyal client base of small to mid-sized businesses and individuals across diverse industries. What truly sets this practice apart is its deep bench of highly credentialed professionals and well-orchestrated workflow.

The Opportunity Step into a well-established Southwest Kansas CPA practice boasting a strong fee structure and an experienced, loyal team in place. Generating a nice cash flow for the owner, this turnkey firm is primed for a smooth transition as the current owner approaches retirement and offers transitional support. The practice is fully rooted and positioned to remain in its current location.

This NE Kansas tax and accounting firm has two locations in the area and the owner is seeking to sell the firm to a buyer who has significant tax preparation experience. With a loyal client base and experienced staff, the firm is ready for new ownership and can remain in the current offices after a sale. Owner is willing to assist with a smooth transition and could be available longer if needed by a buyer.

The Opportunity S Central KS Tax & Bookkeeping Firm is a well established, highly reputable, fully paperless, two-location accounting and tax practice located in South Central Kansas. The seller is seeking a CPA or EA buyer. The firm is known for its long standing presence and exceptional client relationships and has built a strong brand and a loyal following across both individual and business markets. This is a turnkey opportunity for an experienced tax and accounting professional, multi office firm, or strategic buyer seeking immediate revenue, operational efficiency, and a strong foothold

The Opportunity Located in the heart of Central Southern Kansas, this well-established CPA firm is known for its professional integrity and deep-rooted client loyalty. With a solid fee structure and a turnkey operational setup, this practice is primed for a seamless transition to a growth-oriented CPA.

Operations are 100% paperless, supported by audit management software with real-time workflow visibility across the team.

This established, full-service CPA firm has built a strong reputation for responsive, personalized service to a loyal client base spanning contracting, restaurants, retail, and services. The firm offers tax preparation and planning, accounting, bookkeeping, payroll, and workers’ compensation audits, with monthly clients receiving proactive tax planning as part of their engagement.

This fully virtual CPA firm offers tax, accounting, bookkeeping, and payroll services to a diverse client base across the US and internationally. Approximately 50% of revenue is derived from business tax, bookkeeping, and payroll services. All preparers are assigned to specific clients, building the long-term relationships that drive retention and referrals.

Established Western North Carolina CPA firm with a strong reputation for personalized, attentive service to a loyal client base of individuals, small businesses, nonprofits, and estates. The practice is primarily tax-focused, with a meaningful concentration in estate and trust work, and serves clients through major life transitions with genuine care and responsiveness.

This well-established North Carolina CPA firm has built a strong reputation around commercial real estate expertise, serving a loyal and stable client base that has grown entirely through referrals and long-term relationships. Revenue has increased year-over-year, supported by a disciplined approach to annual fee adjustments.

Established for over six decades, this well-respected CPA firm offers a rare opportunity to acquire a practice with deep community roots and long-tenured staff. The firm has maintained steady, sustainable growth through a disciplined and selective approach to client acquisition that preserves its strong office culture. Operations are highly efficient and largely paperless, supported by annual fee increases and consistent service delivery built on deep institutional knowledge.

This is a well-established CPA firm with 3 locations that has seen amazing growth year after year including a 116% revenue growth in 2 years (including acquisitions)! This firm is the perfect acquisition for a firm, PE buyer or entrepreneur looking to get into the NC market and expand in the South. Affluent clients love this firm as a one stop shop for all their accounting and finance needs. The company has carved out a niche for itself by offering customized financial solutions to match the particular requirements of its clientele, with a focus on helping rural government agencies. This is a well-established and profitable (70%) full-service CAS and tax firm that works with both small and medium-sized businesses. This is a highly professional CPA practice with excellent staff who operate in a collaborative, professional environment with minimal supervision. Cloud platforms, along with practice management software, provide the owner critical insights into the practice while also providing clients with excellent value and a great client experience. The firm serves a deliberate mix of professionals, high-net-worth individuals, closely held businesses, real estate, and family-owned companies, with rates that align with top-tier firms in the region and a client base that pays without resistance. This well-established CPA firm on Long Island, New York generated over $2 million in 2025 revenue, with a diversified, recurring client base across multiple industries. The firm sits in a prime business location with strong demographics, excellent client retention, and a loyal book built over decades through referrals and reputation, without any active marketing or solicitation.

This well-established multi-partner CPA firm has built a long-standing reputation for deeply personalized service across a diverse client base that includes manufacturers, medical practices, construction companies, nonprofits, real estate entities, and high-net-worth individuals. Revenue has held consistently in the $2.4M to $2.5M range annually, supported by regular fee increases, and the firm operates ahead of comparably sized practices technologically with cloud-based systems and fully documented workflows.

This full-service firm has built a loyal and growing client base through personalized, education-first service to small and mid-size businesses and individuals. The practice serves a diverse mix of clients. A well-established bilingual service capability serving a significant Spanish-speaking client population has created a distinctively positioned practice in a large and expanding market, supported by strong community recognition and consistent organic referral growth.

This is a rare opportunity to acquire a high-performing, premium-priced CPA firm with a seasoned leadership team, top-tier staff, and a highly curated client base. Unlike traditional CPA firms, this business operates independently of the owner, with all client relationships owned by the firm rather than any individual employee—ensuring continuity and scalability.

This long-established and distinguished CPA firm boasts a stellar reputation. TX2006 has exceptional service and an unwavering commitment to client success. This firm has cultivated a dedicated clientele nationwide who are willing to pay high fees and offer referrals. Service at the firm is unmatched thanks to the seasoned and independent 20+ person team! They are a loyal and hardworking group dedicated to client relationships and there has been very little employee turnover.

This is not your typical accounting practice. This firm has established itself as a leading player in the industry with long term clients and a fully staffed hybrid office. The majority of clients are handled remotely. Services provided include CFO & financial management, business & financial strategy, fractional accounting and corporate governance. These services are in high demand and are lucrative. Cash flow is consistent throughout the year. This firm has an impressive, dedicated, and skilled staff who work independently.

This full-service CPA firm has operated as a genuinely self-sufficient practice for over 15 years under the current owners. The two owners work a combined 30 hours annually and are focused on their other CPA firms, checking in one to two hours per month while experienced managing CPAs handle all client relationships, workflow oversight, staff management, and business development. The firm has been established for several decades, and the client base reflects that longevity, with many relationships extending well over two decades. Established for several decades, this three-partner CPA firm has been a trusted financial resource across two New England communities, serving a diverse and loyal client base. The firm is known for attentive, relationship-driven service and has maintained long-standing client relationships built on consistent, high-quality work.

The Opportunity We are pleased to announce a new opportunity for a CPA or EA to acquire an established practice in the Waco area. The seller is approaching retirement and is looking for a qualified successor to take over a firm backed by a solid team and consistent performance.
